text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's like Grandma said, the world of racing is
special.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, there's an incredible spell that can
only be used here.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You mean, like, racing magic? That would be so
cool if it was real!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It is real! If you think it's fake, then you just don't know enough about magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But anyway, don't forget about the scrimmage
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! ☆ I'm gonna go full throttle! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I think you might be in for a surprise when
you see Sweet Pea run! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You better believe I'll show my familiar that
I'm a master that's worth devoting to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the beginning of Sweep Tosho's
training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to try a scrimmage right away to get a
taste of racing magic. I figure she's bursting with
motivat—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Freaking! Waaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some of Sweep Tosho's classmates, Mayano Top
Gun, Biko Pegasus, and Nishino Flower, stand
around her while she throws a fit.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I don't wanna run with anyone anymore!
I'm outta here!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see what happened! A young girl's heart is
complicated, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Try thinking back to what you said just before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back to when Sweep Tosho introduced
everyone to me earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heyo! ☆ Let's have a good race today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun, known for her versatile running
style, and two dedicated sprinters showed up for
today's scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. They adjusted the distance for us this
time, so it'll be a 1,000-meter race today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower specializes in sprints. She's a
genius who showed her prowess earlier than most
and gained early admittance to Tracen Academy.
choice_data_list:
Honestly, it's a great opportunity to compete
against all of you!

Honestly, it's a great opportunity to compete
against all of you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! I'm all fired up! Time to warm up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Biko Pegasus. She's an inspiring student
determined to take on any opponent, no matter
how strong.
choice_data_list: Imagine if we could get you guts like hers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racing Biko Pegasus is sure to benefit Sweep
Tosho. At least, that's what I'm thinking, when...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nnngh, hey! You know that you're my familiar, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ugh! You big idiot!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Dumb, stupid familiar! Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Sweet Pea?! What's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before there's any time to stop her, Sweep Tosho
runs straight off the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She disappears in the blink of an eye, just like a
shooting star. Her speed and acceleration are
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no question—she has a hidden potential
unlike anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What are you spacing out for?! Go after her!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's obvious that you two are a great pair. Plus,
there's no need for you to worry about us.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So just go get Sweep, okay?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mayano Top Gun and the others urge me
to go looking for Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I finally find her in the library!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph! Stupid familiar! Later, dummy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um... Are you two fighting? You and Sweep, I
mean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(This is Zenno Rob Roy. She's in her classic year
and good friends with Sweep Tosho.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I see. So... she ran off before the scrimmage with
her friends, and now you're here...
choice_data_list: She was so fast when she ran off, though!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. You can't hide that sparkle in your eye.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
From a certain point of view, arrogance is purity.
And so, as a servant to my king, I too must serve
with purity.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... It's from a book! That is...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Listening to what you said just now... I thought it
would be best to be direct with her. ...What do
you think?
choice_data_list: I should tell her my honest feelings? Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What do you want?
choice_data_list: I thought you were incredible earlier.
I thought you were incredible earlier.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! What's with you all of a sudden?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell her my honest feelings from today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I saw who was running in the scrimmage, I
thought racing them was going to be a great
opportunity for Sweep Tosho's future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when she stormed off, I couldn't help but be
captivated by the talent she displayed.
choice_data_list: I thought the way you ran was magical.
I thought the way you ran was magical.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Are you stupid?! Did you think I'd be happy just
because you say I'm magical?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But... if you really think that...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Familiar! I'm gonna run one more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sweep Tosho runs one more lap. When I
see her running so comfortably at such an
incredible speed, I can only think...
choice_data_list: Yep, you really do run like magic!
Yep, you really do run like magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. Not "like" magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm Magical Girl Sweepy, the one destined to
discover the real magic spell for racing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I warn you... racing magic isn't easy to find! It
takes determination.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grandma also told me I wouldn't be able to find it
unless I run in a bunch of real races.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And since you're my familiar, you've gotta devote
yourself to me and me alone!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Until I discover the racing spell, I need you to put
me first! You can't be focusing on anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So yeah... Just in case. I don't think there's any
way this actually happens, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
On the off chance you do see someone better
than me... you still need to compliment me first!
Not her! Got that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's sealed, then! This is a pact with your master,
so don't you dare forget!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Now, go get Mayano and the others back here.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Familiars are supposed to be dedicated to
their masters! You've already got a chance to be
useful, so give it everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you say that running a scrimmage with
them would be good for my future?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my journey as an overworked familiar for
a demanding magical girl on a quest for racing
magic has officially begun!
